channel.title: Rag on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Rag on Arrans github.io

item.title: khoj-ai/khoj
item.description: Your AI second brain. Get answers to your questions, whether they be online or in your own notes. Use online AI models (e.g gpt4) or private, local LLMs (e.g llama3). Self-host locally or use our cloud instance. Access from Obsidian, Emacs, Desktop app, Web or Whatsapp.

item.title: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps
item.description: Collection of awesome LLM apps with RAG using OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini and opensource models.

item.title: mendableai/firecrawl
item.description: 🔥 Turn entire websites into LLM-ready markdown or structured data. Scrape, crawl and extract with a single API.

item.title: run-llama/llama_index
item.description: LlamaIndex is a data framework for your LLM applications

item.title: eosphoros-ai/DB-GPT
item.description: AI Native Data App Development framework with AWEL(Agentic Workflow Expression Language) and Agents
